visual_description: A man in a white shirt and tie stands beside a monitor displaying security footage, while another man in a similar outfit sits nearby, both facing the screen. The standing man gestures toward the monitor, which shows a hallway scene with timestamped footage, while the seated man looks intently at the screen. The scene takes place indoors in a dimly lit room with glass partitions and framed artwork on the walls.
audio_description: The audio features a male speaker with a high-pitched, tone, speaking at a moderate pace.
